mapper.select: SELECT id, api_path, api_method, request_count, success_count, error_count, response_time_total, response_time_max, response_time_min, response_time_avg, stat_date, stat_hour, create_time, update_time FROM sys_monitor_api_performance WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date ASC, stat_hour ASC

SELECT MAX(id) AS id, api_path, api_method, SUM(request_count) AS request_count, SUM(success_count) AS success_count, SUM(error_count) AS error_count, SUM(response_time_total) AS response_time_total, MAX(response_time_max) AS response_time_max, MIN(response_time_min) AS response_time_min, CAST(SUM(response_time_total) * 1.0 / SUM(request_count) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS response_time_avg, MAX(stat_date) AS stat_date, NULL AS stat_hour, MAX(create_time) AS create_time, MAX(update_time) AS update_time FROM sys_monitor_api_performance WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND request_count > 0 GROUP BY api_path, api_method ORDER BY response_time_avg DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT MAX(id) AS id, api_path, api_method, SUM(request_count) AS request_count, SUM(success_count) AS success_count, SUM(error_count) AS error_count, SUM(response_time_total) AS response_time_total, MAX(response_time_max) AS response_time_max, MIN(response_time_min) AS response_time_min, CAST(SUM(response_time_total) * 1.0 / SUM(request_count) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS response_time_avg, MAX(stat_date) AS stat_date, NULL AS stat_hour, MAX(create_time) AS create_time, MAX(update_time) AS update_time FROM sys_monitor_api_performance WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND request_count > 0 GROUP BY api_path, api_method ORDER BY (SUM(error_count) * 1.0 / SUM(request_count)) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
